uvloop==0.22.1 ; platform_python_implementation != 'PyPy' and sys_platform != 'cygwin' and sys_platform != 'emscripten' and sys_platform != 'win32'
    # via uvicorn
vllm==0.18.0 ; sys_platform == 'linux'
    # via dpo-eval
watchfiles==1.1.1 ; sys_platform != 'emscripten' and sys_platform != 'win32'
    # via
    #   uvicorn
    #   vllm
wavedrom==2.0.3.post3
    # via markdown2
wcwidth==0.6.0
    # via prompt-toolkit

    # via uvicorn
